CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS url_tracking (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    url_hash VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    original_url TEXT NOT NULL,
    normalized_url TEXT NOT NULL,
    domain_id INTEGER REFERENCES domains(id),
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''discovered'',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    processed_at TIMESTAMP,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP,
    processing_attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_error TEXT,
    metadata JSONB DEFAULT ''{}''
);")

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS url_tracking (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    url_hash VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    original_url TEXT NOT NULL,
    normalized_url TEXT NOT NULL,
    domain_id UUID REFERENCES domains(id),
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''discovered'',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    processed_at TIMESTAMP,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP,
    processing_attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_error TEXT,
    metadata JSONB DEFAULT ''{}''
);")

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS monitoring_queue (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    domain_id UUID REFERENCES domains(id),
    url TEXT NOT NULL,
    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    scheduled_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''pending'',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_queue_domain_priority ON monitoring_queue(domain_id, priority, scheduled_at);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "
-- Create crawl4ai_results table to store crawl4ai extraction results
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crawl4ai_results (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    domain_id UUID REFERENCES domains(id),
    url TEXT NOT NULL,
    url_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
    success BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    title TEXT,
    content TEXT,
    markdown_content TEXT,
    metadata JSONB DEFAULT ''{}'',
    extracted_data JSONB DEFAULT ''{}'',
    error_message TEXT,
    processing_time_ms INTEGER,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(url_hash, domain_id)
);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "
-- Create domain_templates table for extraction patterns
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS domain_templates (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    domain_id UUID REFERENCES domains(id),
    template_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    template_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- ''article'', ''list'', ''category''
    css_selectors JSONB DEFAULT ''{}'',
    xpath_selectors JSONB DEFAULT ''{}'',
    extraction_rules JSONB DEFAULT ''{}'',
    confidence_score DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.0,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(domain_id, template_name)
);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, id FROM domains LIMIT 3;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "
SELECT 
    schemaname,
    tablename,
    tableowner
FROM pg_tables 
WHERE schemaname = ''public''
ORDER BY tablename;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, base_url FROM domains WHERE status = ''ACTIVE'' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT ''Connection OK'' as status;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "\d url_tracking")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "ALTER TABLE domains ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS homepage_urls JSONB DEFAULT ''[]''::jsonb;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "ALTER TABLE domains ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category_urls JSONB DEFAULT ''[]''::jsonb;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "\du")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=postgres crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d crawler_db -c "SELECT ''Postgres user works'' as status;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count FROM domains WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k'' ORDER BY category_count DESC, name;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, base_url, last_analyzed_at FROM domains WHERE jsonb_array_length(category_urls) = 0 AND analysis_model = ''newspaper4k'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, base_url, jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) as rss_count, jsonb_array_length(sitemaps) as sitemap_count, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count, jsonb_array_length(homepage_urls) as homepage_count FROM domains WHERE name = ''phunuonline.com.vn'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jsonb_array_length(category_urls) = 0) as zero_categories, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jsonb_array_length(category_urls) > 0) as has_categories FROM domains WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN jsonb_array_length(category_urls) = 0 THEN ''0 categories''
    WHEN jsonb_array_length(category_urls) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN ''1-5 categories''
    WHEN jsonb_array_length(category_urls) BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN ''6-20 categories''
    WHEN jsonb_array_length(category_urls) BETWEEN 21 AND 50 THEN ''21-50 categories''
    ELSE ''50+ categories''
  END as category_range,
  COUNT(*) as domain_count
FROM domains 
WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k''
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(jsonb_array_length(category_urls));")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, base_url, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count, category_urls FROM domains WHERE name = ''vnexpress.net'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count, category_urls FROM domains WHERE jsonb_array_length(category_urls) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 AND analysis_model = ''newspaper4k'' ORDER BY category_count, name;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k-improved'') as improved, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) > 0) as with_rss, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jsonb_array_length(category_urls) > 0) as with_categories FROM domains WHERE status = ''ACTIVE'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) as rss_count, jsonb_array_length(sitemaps) as sitemap_count, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count FROM domains WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k-improved'' ORDER BY category_count DESC, rss_count DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) > 0) as with_rss, MAX(jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds)) as max_rss, AVG(jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds))::numeric(5,1) as avg_rss FROM domains WHERE analysis_model = ''newspaper4k-improved'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, base_url, jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) as rss_count, jsonb_array_length(sitemaps) as sitemap_count, jsonb_array_length(homepage_urls) as homepage_count, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count FROM domains WHERE status = ''ACTIVE'' ORDER BY name LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT ''Database connection working'' as status;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_urls FROM url_tracking;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url, status, metadata->>''source_type'' as source_type, created_at FROM url_tracking ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url, url_hash, status, metadata, created_at FROM url_tracking ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_urls FROM url_tracking;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url, status, metadata->>''source_type'' as source_type, created_at FROM url_tracking WHERE metadata->>''discovered_by'' = ''url-tracking-worker'' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''10 minutes'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url, COUNT(*) as duplicate_count FROM url_tracking GROUP BY original_url HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT url_hash, COUNT(*) as hash_count FROM url_tracking GROUP BY url_hash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT ''url_tracking'' as table_name, COUNT(*) as total_records FROM url_tracking UNION ALL SELECT ''unique_hashes'' as table_name, COUNT(DISTINCT url_hash) as unique_hashes FROM url_tracking;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_active_domains FROM domains WHERE status = ''ACTIVE'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT name, analysis_model, jsonb_array_length(rss_feeds) as rss_count, jsonb_array_length(sitemaps) as sitemap_count, jsonb_array_length(category_urls) as category_count FROM domains WHERE status = ''ACTIVE'' ORDER BY name;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT d.name, COUNT(ut.id) as url_count, MAX(ut.created_at) as last_crawled FROM domains d LEFT JOIN url_tracking ut ON d.id = ut.domain_id AND ut.metadata->>''discovered_by'' = ''url-tracking-worker'' WHERE d.status = ''ACTIVE'' GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY last_crawled DESC NULLS LAST;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_new_urls FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''30 minutes'' AND metadata->>''discovered_by'' = ''url-tracking-worker'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_urls FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''1 hour'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_urls FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''30 minutes'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT url_hash, COUNT(*) as duplicate_count FROM url_tracking GROUP BY url_hash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT original_url) as unique_urls, COUNT(*) as total_records FROM url_tracking;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url FROM url_tracking WHERE original_url LIKE ''%]]></link>%'' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''5 minutes'' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_new_urls FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''5 minutes'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as urls_with_artifacts FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''5 minutes'' AND original_url LIKE ''%]]></link>%'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "DELETE FROM url_tracking WHERE original_url LIKE ''%]]></link>%'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM url_tracking WHERE original_url LIKE ''%]]></link>%'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_urls, COUNT(DISTINCT url_hash) as unique_hashes FROM url_tracking;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=crawler123 docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=crawler123 crawler_postgres psql -h localhost -U crawler_user -d crawler_db -c "SELECT original_url FROM url_tracking WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL ''5 minutes'' AND original_url LIKE ''%C3%'' OR original_url LIKE ''%E1%'' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
